description: Template for bridge.json. Copy this file to bridge.json, then customise the vaults map to match your local vault setup. External bridges (e.g. ro:wiki) read your local bridge.json to discover vault routing without invoking project-local skills directly. bridge.json itself is gitignored so your private vault list does not leak to the public engine repo.

session.purpose: Long working session: findings, decisions, calibration notes, knowledge captured.

text.purpose: Pasted text or a local markdown file.

notes.purpose: Drop raw notes into scratchpad/ for later cleanup.

my-research-hub.purpose: Example hub vault for one stable knowledge domain (replace with your own).

my-project-spoke.purpose: Example spoke vault tied to a specific project (replace with your own).

my-pipeline-activity.purpose: Example activity vault: pipeline state over time (replace with your own).
